title: NovaLoop Checkout API Contract — v2 Specification
author: derek.vasquez
content:
CHECKOUT API v2 CONTRACT
Version: 2.0.0 | Published: 2026-04-25 02:00 UTC | Author: Derek Vasquez

Base URL: https://api.novaloop.io/v2

POST /v2/checkout
Authentication: Bearer token (Authorization header)

Request body:
{
  'cart_id': string (required),
  'payment_method_token': string (required),  // replaces card_details in v1
  'promo_code': string (optional),
  'idempotency_key': string (recommended)
}

Response 200:
{
  'checkout_session_id': string,  // new in v2
  'status': 'confirmed' | 'pending' | 'failed',
  'total_charged_cents': integer,
  'confirmation_number': string
}

Migration from v1:
- Replace /v1/checkout with /v2/checkout in all client calls
- Replace card_details object with payment_method_token string
- Handle checkout_session_id in response (idempotency)
- v1 endpoint deprecated — will return 410 on 2026-05-01

Status: BREAKING CHANGE — all integrations must update before 2026-04-28 launch
